phase-plan.purpose: Make visualization modes consistent by having Deltas switch the same viewport area used by 3D/JSON, while simplifying right-column context.
phase-plan.scope: Update Space Explorer visualization panel only: remove Entity Tile, remove Reachability tab, move reachability rows to header badges with icon/color coding, keep data-theme context consistency.

file.description: Primary UI behavior and rendering changes for visualization modes and reachability presentation.
Record task metadata and verification command trail.
Append phase 44 plan line for viewport parity pass.

task.description: Refactor mode state to include `deltas` as a primary visualization mode.
Replace reachability tab content with compact header badges using icon + color coding.
Remove entity tile and keep right column focused on the visualization panel.

decision.summary: Deltas belongs in the same viewport surface as 3D/JSON, not a secondary subpanel.
decision.impact: Reduces context switching and aligns user mental model of visualization mode toggles.
